'''Team Yag'Dhul''' was a [[Limmie/Legends|limmie]] team that played for the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Yag'Dhul/Legends|Yag'Dhul]] in the [[Galactic Cup of Limmie]]. On the [[Great ReSynchronization|date]] [[22 BBY/Legends|13:3:14]], it was reported on an issue of the [[HoloNet News CoCo District Edition|CoCo District Edition]] of [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]] that they they humiliated the planet [[Kinyen/Legends|Kinyen's]] [[Team Kinyen|team]] in the tournament's opening round when they won with two unanswered scores by [[Onila Richblum]].<ref name="Holo" />

==Behind the scenes==
Team Yag'Dhul was mentioned in [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 47|''HoloNet News Vol. 531 #47'']], a<ref name="Holo" /> [[March 14]], [[2002]]<ref name="HNN47 date">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6042498|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=IAmTheDarkSide|date=2002-03-14|time=5:40 PM|archivedate=20200305125429}}</ref> [[in-universe]] issue of the HoloNet News<ref name="Holo" /> written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]]<ref name="HNN Credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref> and published on the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News website]].<ref name="Holo" />
